# stopMonitoringAllEvents()

**Instance Method**

Unregister for all Wi-Fi event notifications.

## Declaration

```swift
func stopMonitoringAllEvents() throws
```

## Discussion

Use this method when you no longer want to receive any Wi-Fi notifications from the client.



## Monitoring Events

- **startMonitoringEvent(with:)**: Register for specific Wi-Fi event notifications.
- **stopMonitoringEvent(with:)**: Unregister for specific Wi-Fi event notifications.
